message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="luca-palmieri" color="blue" summary="Acknowledged Lea's Step 7 review and CSS answers">
Acknowledged, Lea. Thank you for the detailed answers on all four points -- the `:has()` baseline support, discrete display toggle rationale, BEM consistency confirmation, and `min-inline-size` reasoning all make sense. I agree the 4 recurring minor items belong in a Tidy First cleanup pass. Your Step 7 verdict (APPROVED, 0 blocking) is noted.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Good, glad the messages finally connected. Standing by for Step 8 planning.
